**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Yueqing Xianfeng Radio Co., Ltd. presents a profile of a highly diminished, 1980s-era micro-workshop located in the 'Wenzhou Model' electrical capital of Yueqing. Despite severe raw data corruption, its historical lineage (extracted from 'industry_medium') shows it was founded in 1988 as 'Yueqing Xianfeng Radio Factory'. Although currently misclassified under 'Automotive Parts Manufacturing', its true business scope (recovered from 'other_email') is a classic Yueqing low-end manufacturing mix: basic auto parts, electrical components, injection molded plastics, and hardware stamping. Crucially, with a corrected workforce of only 2 insured employees (2024) and a micro-capitalization of 1.51 million RMB, this entity operates at the absolute lowest tier of the local supply chain. It is either a nearly defunct 'husband-and-wife' workshop doing marginal sub-assembly, or a dormant shell retaining its legacy manufacturing licenses.

**Risk Profile Summary:**

Operational Status: NEAR-DORMANT / MICRO WORKSHOP SHELL
